summary:
Significant side displacement or fractures involving the condyle require prompt open reduction due to improved accuracy and necessity for precise correction; this approach ensures optimal functional recovery while minimizing risk of long-term complications. 需要即刻实施开放式复位以矫正严重的侧面偏移或涉及髁状突的骨折，因为这种方法能提高准确性并确保精确对齐；这样可以最大限度地实现功能性康复，并降低长期并发症的风险。

The summary captures only two main ideas about when open reduction should be used based on the supporting details mentioned above without repeating them verbatim. It focuses directly on what makes a condition an absolute indication for open reduction regarding its benefits over other methods specifically related to condylar fractures. The language has been simplified slightly but still conveys all necessary information concisely within just under half-a-sentence length per point made originally by Agent2’s detailed explanation. This aligns well with your instructions focusing strictly on essential aspects pertinent to answering whether there are clear indications requiring open treatment here instead expanding into broader medical contexts not asked explicitly. 我们总结为：严重侧面偏移或涉及到髁状突的骨折要求即时采用开放式复位，因其提高了精度且必要性在于能够精准校正；这种做法有助于最佳的功能恢复同时减少长期内在风险。 这两个句子简洁明了地概括了关键点，符合您的指示只关注与回答是否明确指出了绝对需要开刀的情况相关的核心内容而不扩展至更广泛的医学背景信息之外的内容。 总结保持简短精炼的同时涵盖了所有必要的要点来直接回应问题核心需求。
